capabilities.compile: Transforms markdown agent definitions into Azure DevOps YAML pipelines
capabilities.mcp: MCP server support (stdio containers + HTTP backends)

three_stage_model.stage_1: Agent runs in network-isolated sandbox with read-only ADO token, produces safe-output proposals
three_stage_model.stage_2: Detection agent inspects proposals for prompt injection and secret leaks
three_stage_model.stage_3: Executor applies approved safe outputs using write-capable ADO token
